steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice most effectively indicates which ecoregion the willow oak is native to. The only note that mentions an ecoregion is the third bullet: "It is native to the Southeastern ecoregion of the US." Every other detail is irrelevant to this goal.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Deciduous trees are native to several ecoregions of the US.': Mentions ecoregions in general but says nothing about the willow oak specifically. ✗
  • Choice B — 'The willow oak's scientific name is Quercus phellos.': States the scientific name, which is unrelated to ecoregion. ✗
  • Choice C — 'The willow oak (Quercus phellos) is a species of deciduous tree.': Combines the scientific name and tree type, neither of which identifies an ecoregion. ✗
  • Choice D — 'The willow oak is native to the Southeastern ecoregion of the US.': Directly states the willow oak's native ecoregion, fulfilling the goal exactly. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
